zh.of Brough Hall, Ranton, Staffordshire, E: 英國英格蘭斯塔福爾藍頓
zh.of Hertford Priory, Hertfordshire, Engla: 英國賀特福爾賀特福德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Limesi於大約1063年出生在英國爾切斯特時，他的父親Ralph de Limesi25歲，母親Christina Avice15歲。他於大約1107年與Mrs. Robert de Limesi在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾藍頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1117年9月1日在他的家鄉享年55歲。

zh-hans.of Brough Hall, Ranton, Staffordshire, E: 英国英格兰斯塔福爾藍頓
zh-hans.of Hertford Priory, Hertfordshire, Engla: 英国賀特福爾賀特福德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert de Limesi于大约1063年出生在英国爾切斯特时，他的父亲Ralph de Limesi25岁，母亲Christina Avice15岁。他于大约1107年与Mrs. Robert de Limesi在英国英格兰斯塔福爾藍頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1117年9月1日在他的家乡享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Limesi
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Spanish (Limés): habitational name from Limés in Oviedo province, northern Spain.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Limesi was born about 1063, in Chester, Cheshire, England, his father, Ralph de Limesi, was 25 and his mother, Christina Avice, was 15. He married Mrs. Robert de Limesi about 1107, in Ranton, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 1 September 1117, in his hometown, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert de Limesi est né environ 1063, à Chester, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Ralph de Limesi, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Christina Avice, avait 15 ans. Il a épousé Mrs. Robert de Limesi environ 1107, à Ranton, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 1 septembre 1117, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert de Limesi um 1063 in Chester, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ralph de Limesi 25 und seine Mutter Christina Avice 15. Er hat um 1107 in Ranton, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom Mrs. Robert de Limesi geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 1. September 1117 im Alter von 55 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Limesi è nato il circa 1063 nel Chester, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Ralph de Limesi, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Christina Avice, aveva 15 anni. Lui sposato Mrs. Robert de Limesi circa 1107, nel Ranton, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 1 settembre 1117, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 55 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert de Limesiが約1063年にイギリスチェシュアイアチェスターで生まれた時，父Ralph de Limesiは25歳，母Christina Aviceは15歳であった。約1107年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアラントンでMrs. Robert de Limesiと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1117年9月1日に故郷で55歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Limesi(이)가 대략 1063년 영국 체실르 체스터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph de Limesi(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Christina Avice(은)는 15세였다. 그는 대략 1107년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 랜턴에서 Mrs. Robert de Limesi(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1117년 9월 1일 그의 고향에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Limesi nasceu aproximadamente 1063, em Chester, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Ralph de Limesi, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Christina Avice, tinha 15 anos. Ele casou-se com Mrs. Robert de Limesi aproximadamente 1107, em Ranton, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1 de setembro de 1117, em sua cidade natal, com 55 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Limesi родился около 1063 г. в местности честир, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Ralph de Limesi было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Christina Avice, 15. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs. Robert de Limesi около 1107 г. в местности рантон, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 1 сентября 1117 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 55 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert de Limesi nació aproximadamente 1063, en Chester, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Ralph de Limesi, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Christina Avice, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Mrs. Robert de Limesi aproximadamente 1107, en Ranton, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 1 de septiembre de 1117, en su pueblo, a la edad de 55 años.
